item.title: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今…
item.author: katokich (@katokich.bsky.social)
item.description: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今度いつ来る」とニコニコしながらおにぎり食べてて最高すぎる
item.content:encoded: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今度いつ来る」とニコニコしながらおにぎり食べてて最高すぎる

item.title: Graham Platner suspended his campaign for Senate in Maine, b…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Graham Platner suspended his campaign for Senate in Maine, bowing to intense pressure from party leaders after a rape allegation he denies, and opening an uncertain and highly unusual chapter for Maine Democrats. Here’s what comes next.
item.content:encoded: Graham Platner suspended his campaign for Senate in Maine, bowing to intense pressure from party leaders after a rape allegation he denies, and opening an uncertain and highly unusual chapter for Maine Democrats. Here’s what comes next.

item.title: Analysis: the 2026 Emmy nominations for acting and hosting h…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Analysis: the 2026 Emmy nominations for acting and hosting hit an 11-year low with only 22 performers of color recognized, down 21% from the nominees in 2025 (Anthony D'Alessandro/Deadline)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Analysis: the 2026 Emmy nominations for acting and hosting hit an 11-year low with only 22 performers of color recognized, down 21% from the nominees in 2025 (Anthony D'Alessandro/Deadline)

item.title: An elderly man caring for his aging dog shows the kind of lo…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: An elderly man caring for his aging dog shows the kind of loyalty dogs teach us without words. Senior dogs need extra attention, but the bond only deepens with time.
item.content:encoded: An elderly man caring for his aging dog shows the kind of loyalty dogs teach us without words. Senior dogs need extra attention, but the bond only deepens with time.

item.title: An MSG database tracked and categorized hundreds of celebs, …
item.author: WIRED (@wired.com)
item.description: An MSG database tracked and categorized hundreds of celebs, famous Knicks superfans, and even some of Taylor Swift’s wedding guests. Labels included “LGBTQIA,” “DO NOT HOST,” and low to high “risk.” www.wired.com/story/madiso...
item.content:encoded: An MSG database tracked and categorized hundreds of celebs, famous Knicks superfans, and even some of Taylor Swift’s wedding guests. Labels included “LGBTQIA,” “DO NOT HOST,” and low to high “risk.” www.wired.com/story/madiso...

item.title: Look at this boy. Look at him! A bit after this, I didn't …
item.author: Veronica (@veronicaf.bsky.social)
item.description:
Look at this boy. Look at him!

A bit after this, I didn't have my phone handy, but he rolled over and begged for all of the belly rubs.

He also pressed his forehead into my forehead and it was good.
item.content:encoded:
Look at this boy. Look at him!

A bit after this, I didn't have my phone handy, but he rolled over and begged for all of the belly rubs.

He also pressed his forehead into my forehead and it was good.

item.title: I am shaking because I found a LeBron James rookie card that…
item.author: Gurt Sherm (@gurtsherm.bsky.social)
item.description:
I am shaking because I found a LeBron James rookie card that sells between $150 and $400

and somehow when I was eight years old I hat the foresight to put it in a sealed container
item.content:encoded:
I am shaking because I found a LeBron James rookie card that sells between $150 and $400

and somehow when I was eight years old I hat the foresight to put it in a sealed container

item.title: Modern farming depends on cheap fertilizer. The war made fer…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Modern farming depends on cheap fertilizer. The war made fertilizer more expensive, with ships trapped, fertilizer plants shut down, farmers panicking and world food production thrown into peril reut.rs/4ybha23
item.content:encoded: Modern farming depends on cheap fertilizer. The war made fertilizer more expensive, with ships trapped, fertilizer plants shut down, farmers panicking and world food production thrown into peril reut.rs/4ybha23

item.title: Anyone else's hydrangeas go completely nuts in the PNW this …
item.author: Michele (@burienwino.bsky.social)
item.description: Anyone else's hydrangeas go completely nuts in the PNW this year? 🌱
item.content:encoded: Anyone else's hydrangeas go completely nuts in the PNW this year? 🌱

item.title: 7月8日（水） #momoポートレート 5月の或る日 【momoneko in Bangkok】🇹🇭 先日の答…
item.author: 桃猫momoneko (@momonekofold.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月8日（水）

#momoポートレート

5月の或る日
【momoneko in Bangkok】🇹🇭

先日の答え
①「36度」
身体がいきなり真夏仕様になり
帰ってきてからこれまで
日本での暑さを感じないほどﾃﾞｽ😅

今回の寺院は
「ﾜｯﾄ・ﾊﾟｰｸﾅﾑ・ﾊﾟｰｼｰﾁｬﾙｰﾝ」
エメラルド色の仏塔がとても美しく
金色に輝く巨大仏像も圧巻です😄

┈

《question ⁉︎》

この景色を実際に見たら
最初に何を感じると思う…⁈🤔

①美しさに感動する
②大きさに驚く
③心が落ち着く
④何だか笑顔になる
⑤その他

@bskyphotos.bsky.social
#写真好きな人と繋がりたい
item.content:encoded:
7月8日（水）

#momoポートレート

5月の或る日
【momoneko in Bangkok】🇹🇭

先日の答え
①「36度」
身体がいきなり真夏仕様になり
帰ってきてからこれまで
日本での暑さを感じないほどﾃﾞｽ😅

今回の寺院は
「ﾜｯﾄ・ﾊﾟｰｸﾅﾑ・ﾊﾟｰｼｰﾁｬﾙｰﾝ」
エメラルド色の仏塔がとても美しく
金色に輝く巨大仏像も圧巻です😄

┈

《question ⁉︎》

この景色を実際に見たら
最初に何を感じると思う…⁈🤔

①美しさに感動する
②大きさに驚く
③心が落ち着く
④何だか笑顔になる
⑤その他

@bskyphotos.bsky.social
#写真好きな人と繋がりたい

item.title: このたび、第十八回伊丹十三賞を受賞いたしました。 のんさん、星野源さん、宮藤官九郎さん…と、歴代の受賞者がきらびやかすぎ…
item.author: 岸本佐知子 (@karyobinga.bsky.social)
item.description:
このたび、第十八回伊丹十三賞を受賞いたしました。
のんさん、星野源さん、宮藤官九郎さん…と、歴代の受賞者がきらびやかすぎて、「本当においらでいいのかい?？」と大いにキョドっておりますが、素直に嬉しいです。
ありがとうございます。

www.asahi.com/and/entertai...
item.content:encoded:
このたび、第十八回伊丹十三賞を受賞いたしました。
のんさん、星野源さん、宮藤官九郎さん…と、歴代の受賞者がきらびやかすぎて、「本当においらでいいのかい?？」と大いにキョドっておりますが、素直に嬉しいです。
ありがとうございます。

www.asahi.com/and/entertai...

item.title: Legendary pop singer Bonnie Tyler, who became a known for hi…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Legendary pop singer Bonnie Tyler, who became a known for hits including “Total Eclipse of the Heart,” has died after weeks in the hospital, her family says. She was 75.
item.content:encoded: Legendary pop singer Bonnie Tyler, who became a known for hits including “Total Eclipse of the Heart,” has died after weeks in the hospital, her family says. She was 75.

item.title: When you accidentally find your doppelganger on a painting m…
item.author: Archaeo - Histories (@archaeohistories.bsky.social)
item.description:
When you accidentally find your doppelganger on a painting made over 100 years old. 😀

🎨 : ''The broken Pitcher'' (1891 AD), by William - Adolphe Bouguereau.

Legion of Honor Art Museum, San Francisco 🇺🇸

#archaeohistories
item.content:encoded:
When you accidentally find your doppelganger on a painting made over 100 years old. 😀

🎨 : ''The broken Pitcher'' (1891 AD), by William - Adolphe Bouguereau.

item.title: Before another old tree falls, let us remember that someone …
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: Before another old tree falls, let us remember that someone already lives there. Home is precious—whether it belongs to us, a bird, a squirrel, an owl, or a doe and her fawn.
item.content:encoded: Before another old tree falls, let us remember that someone already lives there. Home is precious—whether it belongs to us, a bird, a squirrel, an owl, or a doe and her fawn.

item.content:encoded: Bonnie Tyler, 80s pop legend known for Total Eclipse of the Heart and more, dies aged 75

item.title: A maternity ward doctor donated his own blood during surgery…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
A maternity ward doctor donated his own blood during surgery to keep a pregnant patient alive.

One woman gained fewer than 10 pounds over her entire pregnancy.

Another collapsed and had seizures during labor.

(Published Dec. 2025)
item.content:encoded:
A maternity ward doctor donated his own blood during surgery to keep a pregnant patient alive.

One woman gained fewer than 10 pounds over her entire pregnancy.

Another collapsed and had seizures during labor.

(Published Dec. 2025)

item.title: BREAKING: Graham Platner is ending his Maine Senate bid. D…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description:
BREAKING: Graham Platner is ending his Maine Senate bid.

Democrats widely abandoned him after a POLITICO report that a woman alleges he forced her to have sex, which he denies.
item.content:encoded:
BREAKING: Graham Platner is ending his Maine Senate bid.

Democrats widely abandoned him after a POLITICO report that a woman alleges he forced her to have sex, which he denies.

item.title: We've released v0.0.247 for DELTARUNE Chapter 5 on Steam/Pla…
item.author: UNDERTALE/DELTARUNE (@undertale.com)
item.description: We've released v0.0.247 for DELTARUNE Chapter 5 on Steam/PlayStation. This fixes a number of minor issues and bugs across the game. We plan to continue with a couple more patches.
item.content:encoded: We've released v0.0.247 for DELTARUNE Chapter 5 on Steam/PlayStation. This fixes a number of minor issues and bugs across the game. We plan to continue with a couple more patches.

item.title: Three people have been charged in connection with allegation…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Three people have been charged in connection with allegations that they either took or tried to take pieces of blue sealant from the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Washington, according to court documents. They were arraigned Wednesday and have pleaded not guilty.
item.content:encoded: Three people have been charged in connection with allegations that they either took or tried to take pieces of blue sealant from the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Washington, according to court documents. They were arraigned Wednesday and have pleaded not guilty.

item.title: Holidaymakers battling for poolside loungers may have finall…
item.author: The Mirror (@mirror.co.uk)
item.description: Holidaymakers battling for poolside loungers may have finally met their match after a hotel worker was filmed removing towels and bags from reserved sunbeds while guests were at breakfast.
item.content:encoded: Holidaymakers battling for poolside loungers may have finally met their match after a hotel worker was filmed removing towels and bags from reserved sunbeds while guests were at breakfast.
